title: ecbolium campestre
intro: Ecbolium campestre, also known as the dwarf bugloss, is a perennial herb belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of ecbolium campestre include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of ecbolium campestre can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
